vllm.title: Allow model to be served under multiple names
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This means that you can have more specific model names without requiring users to update their configs whenever you change something that warrants a model name change.
If you passed --served-model-name gpt-4-0613 gpt-4, then your users could make requests to either gpt-4 or gpt-4-0613. The model fie

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Get available quantization methods from quantization registry
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We were not treating the _QUANTIZATION_CONFIG_REGISTRY as the source of truth. This led to many quantization argument options being out-of-date, such as "marlin" not being available in the argparse of some scripts. I propose renaming _QUANTIZATION_CONFIG_REGISTRY to QUANTIZATION_METHODS and using th

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] allow non-power-of-two head sizes in prefix prefill
vllm.author: mmoskal
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The existing prefix prefill kernel only supports head dimension that is a power of two. This due to Triton only supporting power of two block sizes. This PR enlarges the Q,K,V tensors to the next power of two and pads them with zeros when reading (and writing).
It doesn't seem to affect performance

vllm.title: [Docs] document that Meta Llama 3 is supported
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The official branding is Meta Llama 3.
Also correct the naming for Llama 2.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Support logprobs when using guided_json and other constrained decoding fields
vllm.author: jamestwhedbee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Note: I am unsure this is the best way to do this, so I am opening this draft PR to start the discussion. I started with the minimal possible change to match OpenAI's behavior.
Right now, a request like the following fails with an internal server error. This is because with constrained decoding, man

vllm.title: [Misc] Bump transformers to latest version
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There are small changes to the tokenizers library related to supporting the converted llama 3 titkoken tokenizer.

vllm.title: [CI/CD] add neuron docker and ci test scripts
vllm.author: liangfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds initial CI/CD for testing neuron backend support.
Neuron backend testing is ready.
It takes about 5 to 10 minutes to test with TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0.  See https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/4578#018ecf71-49b0-4b88-818f-fa7ef697d3a2
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECK

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix CustomAllreduce pcie nvlink topology detection (#3974)
vllm.author: agt
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
CustomAllreduce requires nvidia GPUs to be fully connected via NVlink, and attempts to disable itself when run on incompatible hardware (e.g. >2 PCIE GPU where only specific pairs of cards are linked).
Current code calls nvmlDeviceGetNvLinkState(), but that method does not actually assess peer conne

vllm.title: [Core] add an option to log every function call to for debugging hang/crash in distributed inference
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We often receive issue report from users that programs hang or crash in certain scenario. It is very difficult to debug. This PR adds an option to run with export VLLM_TRACE_FUNCTION=1 , which will log every function call in vllm. This way, we can know the final function and call stack before progra

vllm.title: Support eos_token_id from generation_config.json
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Related to #4180
Some models uses eos_token_id field (Optional[Union[int, list[int]]) in generation_config.json
https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/v4.39.3/en/main_classes/text_generation#transformers.GenerationConfig
This PR will load the config, get the value if user supplied, and inject it i
